div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 456px; height: 1px; padding-top: 913px; margin-left: 648px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.br: Device-local (localStorage 'scure-cure-history'), newest-first, persists across reload / reboot. The list is populated by the Cure Process run (start / complete / abort / error + telemetry). Each log: material, status, started/ended, duration, steps X/Y, phases, targetTemp, telemetry samples. The page is read-only (no edit / delete).
